mapper.sql: select a.article_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.is_top, a.is_comment, a.category_id, a.user_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, c.category_name, u.user_name as author_name from blog_article a left join blog_category c on a.category_id = c.category_id left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: select a.article_id, a.title, cast(a.content as char) as content, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.is_top, a.is_comment, a.category_id, a.user_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, c.category_name, u.user_name as author_name from blog_article a left join blog_category c on a.category_id = c.category_id left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id where a.article_id = #{articleId}

select a.article_id, a.title, cast(a.content as char) as content, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.is_top, a.is_comment, a.category_id, a.user_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, c.category_name, u.user_name as author_name from blog_article a left join blog_category c on a.category_id = c.category_id left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id where a.article_id = #{articleId} and a.status = '1'
select t.tag_id, t.tag_name from blog_tag t inner join blog_article_tag at on t.tag_id = at.tag_id where at.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.tag_name asc
mapper.insert:
insert into blog_article
title, content, summary, cover_image, status, is_top, is_comment, category_id, user_id, create_time
#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{isComment}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, sysdate()
mapper.update: update blog_article set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where article_id = #{articleId}
update blog_article set view_count = view_count + #{count} where article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into blog_article_tag(article_id, tag_id) values (#{articleId}, #{tagId})
mapper.delete:
delete from blog_article_tag where article_id in
#{articleId}

delete from blog_article where article_id in
#{articleId}
